table_title: Financial Statements and Supplementary Data Table
raw_text:
As of September 27, 2025 and September 28, 2024, the Company had total deferred revenue of $13.7 billion and $12.8 billion,
respectively. As of September 27, 2025, the Company expects 66% of total deferred revenue to be realized in less than a year,
23% within one-to-two years, 9% within two-to-three years and 2% in greater than three years.

subject to fair value hedges was $12.6 billion and $13.5 billion, respectively.
